english_text: Employer of Record: Remote, Effortless & Effective | Garna
Join Garna and experience how a refined remote employment solution can optimize and simplify hiring talents globally.
Employer of Record for global teams
Worldwide Employment Made Simple, Quick & Flawless

Hiring the best talent from around the globe does not have to mean complex compliance rules, separate payroll systems, or new legal entities in every country. Garna gives companies a simple, modern Employer of Record solution for global hiring without operational hassle
An EoR is a third-party company that legally employs workers on behalf of another business and handles payroll, taxes, compliance, contracts, and local employment rules.

A PEO usually works through a co-employment model and often needs the client company to have a local setup. An EoR acts as the official employer so you do not need to set up a business in every country.
Use an EoR when you want to hire people in countries where your company is not already set up to do business.
A local entity can be expensive and slow. An EoR is usually faster and more flexible when you need to test new regions and scale a global team without unnecessary complexity.
Garna provides a flexible global EoR solution with payroll, compliance, onboarding, API integrations, white-label options, and support for multi-country teams.
